title: Create: Light + Easy
description: A Create mod focused adventure modpack!
body:
This is a semi-easy-to-run modpack for the create mod and many other mods. 

The goal of this pack was to create a fun create mod and adventure experience without straying too far from the vanilla experience. I wanted a create-based pack that could run on low to mid-tier PCs.
Another large part of creating this modpack was having a great exploration experience when you weren't creating contraptions. 

Notable Mods   
- Terralith  
- Create  
- Blue Skies  
- Deeper and Darker  
- Alex's Caves  
- Alex's Mobs  
- Ars Nouveau  

Mods not on Modrinth
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
